summoning
Sharp Thinking Dagger's Soul

When attacking, the soul owner has a 70% chance to throw a dagger at a random enemy unit. The dagger deals 500000 pure damage and injures the target. The injured unit's max health is reduced by 40% while the injury is in effect (it can last until the end of the battle). Only one injury effect can be applied to an enemy. The unit attempts to remove the injury every 3 sec. They have a 40% chance of succeeding and removing the effect completely. If they fail, the unit is stunned for 2 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
